name: SetVisibleScreen
doc:
SUB FASTCALL SetVisibleScreen(bankNumber AS UByte)

Set visible screen to bank 5 or 7 and update BANKM system variable (128K+).

name: GetVisibleScreen
doc:
FUNCTION FASTCALL GetVisibleScreen() AS UByte

Return visible screen bank (5 or 7).

name: ToggleVisibleScreen
doc:
SUB FASTCALL ToggleVisibleScreen()

Toggle visible screen between bank 5 and 7.

name: CopyScreen5ToScreen7
doc:
SUB CopyScreen5ToScreen7()

Copy contents of screen5 to screen7 (display file + attributes).

name: CopyScreen7ToScreen5
doc:
SUB CopyScreen7ToScreen5()

Copy contents of screen7 to screen5 (display file + attributes).

name: SetDrawingScreen5
doc:
SUB FASTCALL SetDrawingScreen5()

Set drawing buffers to screen5 addresses.

name: SetDrawingScreen7
doc:
FUNCTION FASTCALL SetDrawingScreen7() AS UByte

Set drawing buffers to screen7 and return previous bank at $c000.

name: ToggleDrawingScreen
doc:
SUB FASTCALL ToggleDrawingScreen()

Toggle drawing buffers between screen5 and screen7.

name: ChangeMaskedSpritesBackgroundSet
doc:
FUNCTION FASTCALL ChangeMaskedSpritesBackgroundSet() AS Byte

Toggle background set and return new set index.

name: SaveBackgroundAndDrawSprite
parameters: X as UByte, Y as UByte, backgroundDir as UInteger, spriteImageDir as UInteger
doc:
SUB FASTCALL SaveBackgroundAndDrawSprite(X, Y, backgroundDir, spriteImageDir)

Save background at given Dir and draw masked sprite at (X,Y) using provided sprite image directory.

name: RestoreBackground
parameters: X as UByte, Y as UByte, backgroundDir as UInteger
doc:
SUB FASTCALL RestoreBackground(X, Y, backgroundDir)

Restore previously saved background at (X,Y) from given directory.
